comparison_surface_note: Compares official Configuration clientbound reset_chat framed packet id and empty singleton body by splitting the generated frame and dispatching the official body bytes through Stevenarella packet_by_id.
test_topology_note: The target file and test name are this manifest's current adapter, not the universal runner topology for all oracle cases.

stop_boundary: This manifest proves Configuration clientbound reset_chat packet framing and dispatch/decode for the official singleton empty-body packet only; it does not prove chat UI reset behavior, screen flow, Configuration completion, registry hydration, Play entry, or runtime behavior.
